name: polling scheduler: normalises 30s, 5m, and 2h interval grammar to milliseconds
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/poll-scheduler.sh" --source-id s --fetch-frequency 30s --now-ms 0 --last-fetch-ms 0; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/poll-scheduler.sh" --source-id s --fetch-frequency 5m --now-ms 0 --last-fetch-ms 0; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/poll-scheduler.sh" --source-id s --fetch-frequency 2h --now-ms 0 --last-fetch-ms 0
